goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'shanghai family restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'area'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'leicester' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 09:30'.
Make sure you get 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called shanghai family restaurant
Make sure you get phone number and area
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to leicester and should leave on thursday
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave after 09:30
